title: Drag and drop feature for touch screen monitors
excerpt: Looking to use the drag and drop feature in the calendar on a touch screen monitor, currently items can only drag and drop when using a mouse and not a touch screen monitor.  Looking to schedule operations crews and allo…

posts.author: Acc (Adam )
posts.cookedHtml: Looking to use the drag and drop feature in the calendar on a touch screen monitor, currently items can only drag and drop when using a mouse and not a touch screen monitor. Looking to schedule operations crews and allow Supervisors to edit the scheduled date with a simple drag and drop on the calendar view using a finger and not a mouse.
